items.saveProjectDesc: Export all 4 phases as a single file
items.loadSampleDesc: AI-generated fictional data: climate-change ethnography (42 fragments, 26 codes)

confirm.clear: This will delete all data (fragments, documents, QDA). Are you sure?
confirm.loadProject:
Loading a project will replace all current data.

Continue?
(File: {{name}})

prompt.saveName: Project file name (extension is added automatically)

phase1.emptyHint:
Create one above, import files,
or try the sample.
phase1.placeholderBody:
Write your fragment…

Markdown is supported.
Use [[another fragment's title]] to link fragments together.
phase1.selectPrompt: Select a fragment from the list on the left, or create a new one

phase2.hints: 💡 Drag nodes to rearrange. Drag from a node's edge handle to another node to create a link (auto-syncs to the fragment body in Phase 1). Click a node to open it in the editor.
phase2.codeLegendEmpty: No coding yet. Apply codes in Phase 3 — nodes will then be colored by their dominant category.
phase2.relayoutTooltip: Re-run the force layout from scratch (also resets manual node moves)

colorMode.label: Color
colorMode.degreeHint: Fragments with more links shift toward warm colors — useful to spot hubs at a glance.

phase3.importTooltip: Bring fragments from Phase 1 into the QDA workspace

modal.title: Bring fragments into QDA
modal.subtitle: Selected fragments will be added as files for analysis
modal.empty: Please create fragments in Phase 1 first

empty.title: Phase 4: Ethnography
empty.description: Reorder sections in the binder and weave Phase 1 fragments together into long-form writing.

topbar.selectPrompt: Pick a document from the tabs above, or click "+ New"

binder.title: Binder
binder.empty:
No sections.
Use "+ Section" to add one.

editor.selectPrompt: Select a section from the binder on the left
editor.placeholder:
Write this section...

Use the fragment library on the right to insert content,
or [[title]] to reference fragments inline.

library.title: Fragment library
library.emptyNoFragments:
Fragments you create in Phase 1
will appear here

splash.tagline: Writing — from fragments to links, analysis, and composition
